To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY PIWOWAR's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is denied. Plaintiff waived his rights by not challenging the objections to the first request within 45 days. See New Albertson's Inc. v. Superior Court (2008) 168 Cal.App.4th 1403.1427-28. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
